name: avtohisob
description: Korxona avtomashinalari uchun ehtiyot qismlar hisobi ilovasi

scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && npm run build && npx prisma generate && node dist/server.js
scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/js/config.js && node --check public/js/dom.js && node --check public/js/http.js && node --check public/js/utils.js && node --check public/js/feedback.js && node --check public/js/permissions.js && node --check public/js/row-actions.js && node --check public/js/render-helpers.js && node --check public/js/main.js
